records.m_Talk_ENG: Something's off. Isn't her sword way too light?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something's off. Isn't her sword way too light?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something's off. Isn't her sword way too light?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no reason for her to hold back. She's definitely up to something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no reason for her to hold back. She's definitely up to something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no reason for her to hold back. She's definitely up to something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, whatever! Once we knock her down, she'll talk!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, whatever! Once we knock her down, she'll talk!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, whatever! Once we knock her down, she'll talk!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, what? She vanished?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what? She vanished?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what? She vanished?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Hansol! Did you see where she ran off to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Hansol! Did you see where she ran off to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Hansol! Did you see where she ran off to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She literally disappeared. Same with the other Doppelganger-type C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She literally disappeared. Same with the other Doppelganger-type C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She literally disappeared. Same with the other Doppelganger-type C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
At this rate, it's like they're just stalling for time
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
At this rate, it's like they're just stalling for time
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
At this rate, it's like they're just stalling for time
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get me a line to the other teams now! They're trying to pin us down!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get me a line to the other teams now! They're trying to pin us down!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get me a line to the other teams now! They're trying to pin us down!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They've got something else planned!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They've got something else planned!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They've got something else planned!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-the transmission from HQ's network just cut off! The one that manages all the comms!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-the transmission from HQ's network just cut off! The one that manages all the comms!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-the transmission from HQ's network just cut off! The one that manages all the comms!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It should only respond to authorized personnel. How did they get past it?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It should only respond to authorized personnel. How did they get past it?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It should only respond to authorized personnel. How did they get past it?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This can't be happening! It's one thing if they knew our plan, but getting into HQ's systems...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This can't be happening! It's one thing if they knew our plan, but getting into HQ's systems...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This can't be happening! It's one thing if they knew our plan, but getting into HQ's systems...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Glasses! I've been calling forever! Are you ignoring me?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Glasses! I've been calling forever! Are you ignoring me?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Glasses! I've been calling forever! Are you ignoring me?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want me to beat you to a pulp until you can't talk?! I told you to regroup with us already!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want me to beat you to a pulp until you can't talk?! I told you to regroup with us already!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want me to beat you to a pulp until you can't talk?! I told you to regroup with us already!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Medea? The comms should've been unstable. How did you reach me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Medea? The comms should've been unstable. How did you reach me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Medea? The comms should've been unstable. How did you reach me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, why is your voice coming from inside my glasses...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, why is your voice coming from inside my glasses...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, why is your voice coming from inside my glasses...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because this is the family emergency comms network! Do you have any idea how expensive this is to use?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because this is the family emergency comms network! Do you have any idea how expensive this is to use?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because this is the family emergency comms network! Do you have any idea how expensive this is to use?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you to set up your network properly! What are you gonna do if you mess up something this basic?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you to set up your network properly! What are you gonna do if you mess up something this basic?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you to set up your network properly! What are you gonna do if you mess up something this basic?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, that's not it. The HQ network got shut down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, that's not it. The HQ network got shut down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, that's not it. The HQ network got shut down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And we've been tied up fending off that Cancer girl. We couldn't respond faster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And we've been tied up fending off that Cancer girl. We couldn't respond faster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And we've been tied up fending off that Cancer girl. We couldn't respond faster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? That damn crab's there too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? That damn crab's there too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? That damn crab's there too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn Red Shift. Always pulling this kind of trick.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn Red Shift. Always pulling this kind of trick.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn Red Shift. Always pulling this kind of trick.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll handle coordination. Hook the emergency comms to the ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll handle coordination. Hook the emergency comms to the ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll handle coordination. Hook the emergency comms to the ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're out of time. Move it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're out of time. Move it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're out of time. Move it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes! Right away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes! Right away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes! Right away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Open the network port! I'll use the sub-network to reach HQ!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Open the network port! I'll use the sub-network to reach HQ!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Open the network port! I'll use the sub-network to reach HQ!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nope, nope. If you do that, I'll get scolded for letting the mission fail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nope, nope. If you do that, I'll get scolded for letting the mission fail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nope, nope. If you do that, I'll get scolded for letting the mission fail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on! You're playing with me instead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on! You're playing with me instead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on! You're playing with me instead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hansol! Watch out!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hansol! Watch out!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hansol! Watch out!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyahaha! You're tougher than I thought! This is fun!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyahaha! You're tougher than I thought! This is fun!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyahaha! You're tougher than I thought! This is fun!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's keep going till one of us drops dead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's keep going till one of us drops dead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's keep going till one of us drops dead!
